hypothesis: Training a multi-metal (Fe, Co, Ni) equivariant graph neural network with uncertainty quantification on an expanded XDIP-like dataset that includes Fe, Co, and Ni XAS spectra and corresponding local structures will enable transferable structure-to-spectrum and spectrum-to-structure predictions across metals, including reliable zero-shot inferences for unseen metal environments, with predictive uncertainties that correlate with spectral noise and data incompleteness.
